computer specs 'n stuff

it's a computer man....

Main Desktop (idk its just a old mid PC): 2018 Dell Inspiron 5680

CPU: Intel Core i3-8100

4 cores, 4 threads, clock 3.60GHz, TDP 65w

benchmark scores: 2190 single thread, 6061 multithread

GPU: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 (3gb VRAM)

RAM: 32GB DDR4 (2x16GB socketed)

SSD: WD Blue SN570 NVMe 1TB

HDD: 2x 1TB Seagate BarraCuda 7200rpm

OS: ArcoLinux

Laptop (stereotypical linux user laptop): 2020 Lenovo ThinkPad T14 (Gen 1)

CPU: AMD Ryzen 7 PRO 4750U

8 cores, 16 threads, base clock 1.7GHz, boost 4.1GHz, min TDP 10w, max 25w

benchmark scores: 2453 single thread. 14633 multithread

GPU: AMD Radeon Vega graphics, integrated

RAM: 24GB DDR4 (16gb soldered, 8gb socketed)

SSD: WD Black SN770 NVMe 2TB

OS: Triplebooted with Arch Linux, Windows 10 Enterprise LTSC and macOS Sequoia

Home Server (flooferbox): 2018 Lenovo ThinkCentre m710q

CPU: Intel Core i3-7100T

2 cores, 4 threads, clock 3.4ghz, TDP 35w

benchmark scores: 1923 single thread, 3749 multithread

GPU: Intel HD Graphics 630

RAM: 12GB DDR4 (1x8GB original, 1x4GB upgrade)

SSD: Samsung PM981 256GB NVMe

HDD for NAS: 8TB Seagate Exos 7E10 (upgraded from 1TB seagate portable drive)

OS: Proxmox with a Debian VM

Windows Gaming Desktop (the $100 garage sale beast): 2023 Dell Precision 5820

CPU: Intel Xeon W-2225

4 cores, 8 threads, base clock 4.1ghz, boost 4.6ghz, TDP 105W

benchmark scores : 2622 single thread, 10410 multithread

GPU: NVIDIA RTX A4000 (16GB VRAM)

RAM: 32GB DDR4 ECC (2x16gb socketed)

SSD: Samsung PM9A1 1TB NVMe

HDD: 500GB Seagate BarraCuda 7200rpm (old laptop drive)

OS: Windows 10 Enterprise LTSC

Created on November 8, 2025 at 12:18 AM CST
